summary: Iteration 144: Verified all 5 requested features - SoundBoard handoff, Calendar handoff, War Room scope guard, Board Room and War Room shared shell, and Advisor page load with no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are working correctly
SoundBoard handoff correctly displays BIQc brief with issue, why-now, action-now, if-ignored sections and 3 suggested next options
Calendar handoff correctly displays Advisor Follow-up Draft card with title, summary, start/end datetime fields, and Create/Dismiss buttons
War Room scope guard correctly returns scope-aware response instead of generic analysis for contact note-history questions
Both Board Room and War Room are correctly wrapped in DashboardLayout with sidebar and back button visible
seed_data_creation: Seeded biqc_soundboard_handoff and biqc_calendar_draft via sessionStorage for testing handoff UIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 144 verified all handoff and shell features are working. SoundBoard displays BIQc brief with 3 suggested next options when biqc_soundboard_handoff is in sessionStorage. Calendar displays Advisor Follow-up Draft card with create button when biqc_calendar_draft is in sessionStorage. War Room correctly returns scope-aware responses (tested via API). Board Room and War Room both use shared DashboardLayout shell. Brain is in syncing state during Advisor page load which is expected behavior.

soundboard_handoff.issue_shown: Revenue pipeline showing 30% decline in qualified leads
soundboard_handoff.why_now_shown: Lead volume dropped significantly in last 14 days
soundboard_handoff.action_now_shown: Review pipeline sources and activate recovery campaign
soundboard_handoff.if_ignored_shown: Revenue target at risk if lead generation not recovered
soundboard_handoff.guided_next_moves_text: Choose one of the guided next moves below or ask your own question.
three_suggested_options: Help me prioritise the immediate next move
Turn this into an owner action plan

war_room_scope_guard.test_question: when was the last notes added to a hubspot contact
war_room_scope_guard.expected_behavior: Returns scope-correct response mentioning contact note-history not in current dataset
war_room_scope_guard.actual_response: I can't verify the last note added to a HubSpot contact from the current War Room dataset. This console is grounded in strategic CRM telemetry like deals, pipeline, and response pressure — not contact-level note timelines yet.
